title: Document Downloads
description: Official documents, research reports, policy briefs, and open datasets related to KWIN City — all in one transparent, verified library.

categories.label: Official Government
categories.description: Documents originating from Karnataka state agencies and the central government.

categories.label: Project Briefs
categories.description: Overview documents describing KWIN City's vision, pillars, and investment scope.

categories.label: Open Data
categories.description: Publicly accessible datasets used in KWIN City's Data Insights Lab.

categories.label: Research & Context
categories.description: Technical and policy research providing context for KWIN City's development.

documents.title: KIADB Official Project Notification
documents.description: Official Karnataka Industrial Areas Development Board notification designating the KWIN City development area. This is the primary legal instrument for the project.

documents.title: KWIN City Project Overview Brief
documents.description: Comprehensive overview covering the three pillars (Knowledge, Wellbeing, Innovation), investment vision of ₹40,000 Crore, and projected employment numbers.

documents.title: Bengaluru Aviation Traffic Dataset
documents.description: Kempegowda International Airport traffic data from OpenCity.in — used in KWIN City's Data Insights Lab for connectivity and demand analysis.

documents.title: North Bengaluru Population Data
documents.description: Demographic dataset covering North Bengaluru growth corridors — supports workforce and demand projections for KWIN City.

documents.title: Karnataka Economic Survey
documents.description: Annual economic survey from Government of Karnataka providing industrial policy, investment climate, and infrastructure spending data used as KWIN context.

documents.title: Satellite Town Ring Road (STRR) Corridor Development Plan
documents.description: BBMP/NHAI document outlining the STRR alignment through North Bengaluru — directly relevant to KWIN City's connectivity case.

documents.title: Smart Cities Mission — Integrated Command & Control Guidelines
documents.description: Union Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs guidelines for smart city development, providing the national policy context for KWIN's design standards.
documents.publisher: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs, GoI

documents.title: KWIN City Portal — Open Data Methodology Note
documents.description: Internal methodology note explaining how this portal sources, verifies, and tiers its data — our editorial commitment to transparency.
